privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic Maven project 'data-utils' at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/data-utils with Java 17 compatibility and main class com.datautils.App. The project includes five real dependencies from Maven Central: junit 4.13.2 (test scope), guava 32.1.3-jre, jackson-databind 2.16.0, commons-lang3 3.14.0, and slf4j-api 2.0.9 (implementation scope). The setup script generates Maven project structure with source files and a pom.xml that the agent must convert to Gradle build files (build.gradle and settings.gradle). All metadata version numbers and dependency scopes are accurate.
